goal: Tighten replay, restore, and resumable-thread contracts into a bounded runtime package.
successCriteria: Message-only, checkpoint-backed, and resumable thread restore rules are explicit and tested.
createAgent thread lifecycle helpers preserve consistent persisted histories.
Deferred runtime behaviors are documented instead of being silently implied by helpers.
explicitlyOutOfScope: New multi-agent orchestration features beyond the existing runtime APIs.
Changing public maturity without a separate promotion decision package.
